umm.digiquilt.savehandler
Interface SyncListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
ChallengeFileObserver, WhatsHappeningPanel
public interface SyncListener

Interface for objects who wish to be notified when a synchronize() happens on a SaveHandler.

Version:
$Revision: 1.1 $
Author:
Jason Biatek, last changed by $Author: lamberty $ on $Date: 2008/01/22 17:50:24 $

Method Summary
 void onSynchronize(SaveHandler handler)
          This method will be called whenever a synchronize() happens by the given SaveHandler.
 

Method Detail

onSynchronize

void onSynchronize(SaveHandler handler)
This method will be called whenever a synchronize() happens by the given SaveHandler. A reference to the handler in question will be passed to subscribers.

Parameters:
handler - The handler which was just synchronized.
